signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Classic footwear franchises declining approximately 20% year over year... Sportswear saw sequential improvement up low single digits... consumers are choiceful across price points with performance and value channels gaining share over premium lifestyle.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Our brands have consistently been off-price for consumers, especially in digital, affecting our premium positioning across the entire integrated marketplace — higher mix of off-price sales, higher markdowns, higher wholesale discounts.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We're gonna continue to take it ninety days at a time for now, to give ourselves the flexibility to make the right decision for the long-term health of our brands — and we expect headwinds to continue for the balance of the fiscal year.
